hero.headline: I Build Interfaces That Perform.
hero.name: Andi Asyraful Amal Ilham
hero.tagline: I specialize in building fast, accessible, and production-grade web applications using React and Next.js. Clean code, purposeful design, and real-world results.

about.label: About Me
about.headline: Building with purpose,
about.p1: I'm a Software Engineering student at SMK Telkom Makassar with hands-on internship experience as a Frontend Developer at Ashari Tech. I build production-ready web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
about.p2: I've shipped real products — from responsive component libraries to full-stack integrations — and I care deeply about code quality, performance, and user experience that actually works.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm studying system design, contributing to open source, or experimenting with new frontend patterns. My goal: build software that creates real impact.
about.quote: "Good interfaces are invisible. Great ones make people feel something."

skills.label: Expertise
skills.headline: My
skills.description: Technologies and tools I use to build modern, responsive, and high-quality web applications.

items.title: Burger Loin
items.description: A modern website for a local street burger vendor built with pure HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript. Features a brand-aligned visual identity (#BURGERLOKALINDONESIA), an online ordering system with pickup/delivery flow, WhatsApp Business API integration, and a shipping-fee calculator scoped to the Sudiang service area.

items.title: TK Mitra Bunda
items.description: A smart QR-based attendance application. It digitizes and automates roll calls featuring a real-time dashboard and Text-to-Speech name announcement.
items.overview: Digitizes and automates the attendance and departure recording process for kindergarten students using QR Code technology, replacing the manual (paper) attendance system. Highly suitable for educational institutions and expandable for corporate use.
items.target: Teachers/Homeroom Teachers, School Admins, and Principals (as monitors).
problem_solved: Inaccuracy of arrival and departure data (human error).

features.title: Secure Authentication
features.desc: Login using unexposed cookie-based Supabase Auth.

features.title: Interactive Dashboard
features.desc: Recapitulate daily and monthly attendance data with a modern interface.

features.title: Text-to-Speech QR Scanner
features.desc: Scan QR via camera with Automatic Time mode and audio feedback announcing the name.

features.title: Student Management & QR Generator
features.desc: Manage student data, automatically generate barcodes, and download as PNG.

features.title: Excel Report Export
features.desc: Extract attendance data directly to .xlsx format in one click.

experience.label: Journey
experience.headline: Experience &
experience.growing_desc: A timeline of my professional internship, training, competition wins, and academic achievements in software engineering.

timeline.description: Worked on modern web development projects using React and Next.js. Contributed to responsive user interfaces, reusable component development, and collaborative development workflows in a professional environment.
Won the Web Programming and Graphic Design competition organized by HMP-TI. Demonstrated problem-solving, frontend development, design thinking, and creativity under competitive conditions.
Completed intensive frontend engineering training specializing in React.js. Gained practical hands-on experience in component design, state management, and modern development standards.
Studying software engineering core concepts, algorithm designs, web development, and networking principles, consistently scoring top grades in technical subjects.
